display_text: Giant's Maul, Cost: 0, Tier 4: Neutral item that empowers one attack every 15 seconds to become a guaranteed critical hit. Hitting an enemy with this empowered attack inflicts a 3-second debuff that slows their movement by 10%, attack speed by 15%, and cast speed by 20%. Valuable for ganking and dueling by amplifying burst damage and crippling the target's ability to fight or escape. Stats: CD: 15s, Crit Multiplier: 140%, Slow Duration: 3s.
